headline: EchoStar Is Falling as SpaceX Surges. Why the Stock Looks Cheap.
summary: SpaceX  play  EchoStar  is down sharply Friday even as SpaceX stock surges in its initial day of trading.  The surprising disparity creates an opportunity for investors willing to buy a SpaceX proxy at what appears to be a sizable discount to its net asset value.  EchoStar  stock (ticker  SATS  ) is down 11.4% at $113.52 Friday after trading in a wide range between $106 and $131.
